keys.description: Sequential invoice number counter per tenant per year. The observer reads this via Postgres advisory lock — the cache key is a fast-path lookup for the current counter value. Rebuilt from DB on cache miss.
invalidatedBy: manual: invoice:renumber-year (admin tool for repairing corrupted counters)

keys.description: Same pattern for credit note counters.
Per-customer aging summary (current / 1-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91+ buckets). Read by the customer's own invoice view + support tools. TTL is short because payment events immediately invalidate.
Tenant-wide aging summary. Feeds the /api/v1/reports/invoice-aging endpoint + the SDUI aging-timeline widget.

Materialised revenue report per (tenant, date range, grouping). Fed by GET /reports/revenue + the monthly-report scheduled job. Long TTL because paid-invoice history is append-only for delivered periods.
Tax collected per jurisdiction over a date range. Feeds VAT/GST return prep. Long TTL because past periods don't change.
Pre-signed S3 URL for the invoice PDF. Regenerated when the current signed URL is < 24h from expiry. Version increments on PDF regenerate.
Same pattern for credit note PDFs.

Cached list of invoice IDs a customer may access (own + guardian-of). Read by invoice.enforce_customer_scope middleware on every /invoices/mine request. Short TTL because guardian relationships change rarely but invoice creation is frequent.
Tenant's active dunning schedule (day+3/7/14/30/60 default or Enterprise-customized). Read by DispatchDunningRemindersJob.
Rendered PDF template (Blade view compilation). Read at every PDF render. Cached across renders for a tenant.
List of item_type slugs available to the tenant (base 8 + any extending modules registered via #[AsInvoiceLineItemType]). Read by SDUI line-item picker.
